//: Renderer scope is DOM-only (no Node ambients). `jsx: preserve` emits JSX for Next.js to transform. Four targeted overrides of the base config, all driven by Next.js 16 / shadcn internals: (1) `moduleResolution: bundler` (+ `module: esnext`) because Next's own `.d.ts` files expect bundler-style resolution and NodeNext can't find `next/dist/compiled/@vercel/og/satori`; (2) `skipLibCheck: true` because Next 16's compiled/@vercel/og types reference a sibling `.d.ts` file the package does not ship, which is a Next-side issue we cannot fix; (3) `lib` includes `ES2024` so `PromiseWithResolvers` (used inside next/dist) resolves - base `target: ES2023` is kept; (4) `exactOptionalPropertyTypes: false` because shadcn-generated primitives spread React.ComponentProps onto Radix children and Radix typings declare required props where TS sees `T | undefined` from the spread — shadcn upstream hasn't opted into exact-optional, so we relax only in the renderer (main/preload/packages/services keep the stricter base).
